skillability_rationale: The primary capability of v2rayNG is to act as a proxy client for Android devices, connecting to external services like V2Ray and Xray. It provides a clear task boundary and a well-defined interface for connecting to these services. The service can be easily integrated into workflows that require proxying, and it offers practical automation value for tasks that involve network routing and data transfer. However, deployment friction is present due to the need for Android compatibility and potential operational risks associated with network security and privacy.
name: 2dust/v2rayNG
description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

skillability_rationale: fullPage.js provides a clear and straightforward interface for creating full-screen, single-page websites with scrolling capabilities. It is designed to be easily integrated into web projects and offers practical automation for creating interactive web pages. The task boundary is well-defined, and the library can be used as an agent-callable unit for web automation tasks.
name: alvarotrigo/fullPage.js
description: fullPage plugin by Alvaro Trigo. Create full screen pages fast and simple

skillability_rationale: UnitCommitment.jl provides a comprehensive solution for the SCUC problem in power systems, with a clear task boundary and a modular architecture that allows for practical automation of complex optimization tasks. The web interface enhances accessibility and reduces deployment friction, while the extensive documentation and benchmark instances support task clarity and composability.
name: ANL-CEEESA/UnitCommitment.jl
description: Extensible Julia/JuMP optimization package for Security-Constrained Unit Commitment (SCUC)

skillability_rationale: GPflow provides a service wrapper for Gaussian process models, offering a clear task boundary for building and using these models. It has a well-defined API and can be integrated into larger workflows. The automation value is high as it allows for the automation of complex statistical computations, but deployment friction is moderate due to dependencies on TensorFlow and TensorFlow Probability.
name: GPflow/GPflow
description: Gaussian processes in TensorFlow
